subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! The gaze of loving-kindness hath ever been directed towards thee; were it not for this, naught would have been manifested from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی طرف عنایت بآن جناب متوجه بوده لو لا هذا ما ظهر منک
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @consolation and comfort, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause, @prophecy and fulfillment
